title: Costs
doc_html:
§3383. Costs

            A defendant shall not be required to prepay costs to file an answer to a claim for defamation of character, libel, slander, or damage to reputation referenced in R.S. 13:3381.

            Acts 2018, No. 359, §1.
doc_text:
§3383. Costs
A defendant shall not be required to prepay costs to file an answer to a claim for
defamation of character, libel, slander, or damage to reputation referenced in R.S. 13:3381.
Acts 2018, No. 359, §1.
